productDisplayName: Esprit Women Silver Stardust Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Stardust analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Square Polished stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Stainless steel strap with zircon crystal embellishments and a stud clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Silver dial with crystal embellishments marking the 3, 6, 9 and 12 o& rsquo clock positions Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
